name: ssa-monorepo
description: Monorepo del Sistema de Seguimiento de Adquisiciones (frontend + backend)

scripts.dev: sh -c 'npm run dev -w backend & npm run dev -w frontend & wait'
scripts.start: sh -c 'npm run start -w backend & npm run dev -w frontend & wait'
scripts.dev:stop: sh -c 'for port in 3000 4000; do P=$(lsof -nP -iTCP:$port -sTCP:LISTEN -t 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$P" ]; then echo $P | xargs kill; fi; done; echo listo'
scripts.dev:reset: sh -c 'npm run dev:stop; npm run dev'
scripts.dev:where: sh -c 'for p in $(lsof -nP -iTCP -sTCP:LISTEN | grep -E ":(3000|4000)\\b" | awk '\''{print $2}'\'' | sort -u); do echo PID:$p; ps -o pid,ppid,tty,start,command -p $p; done'
